svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content: <mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="Mozilla/5.0" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="stateful_ledger" name="Architecture"> <mxGraphModel dx="1667" dy="623" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="1200" pageHeight="800" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="bg_ui" parent="1" style="shape=rectangle;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E1F5FE;strokeColor=#0288D1;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;spacingTop=10;" value="Streamlit Frontend Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="260" x="20" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg_state" parent="1" style="shape=rectangle;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#FFF3E0;strokeColor=#F57C00;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;spacingTop=10;" value="State Management Layer" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="260" x="320" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="bg_api" parent="1" style="shape=rectangle;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#E8F5E9;strokeColor=#388E3C;align=center;verticalAlign=top;fontStyle=1;fontSize=14;spacingTop=10;" value="Gemini API Dual-Pass Engine" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="580" width="580" x="620" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui_in" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0288D1;fontSize=12;" value="<b>User Prompt</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="50" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui_chat" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0288D1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=15;spacingTop=10;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Main Chat Interface</b><br><hr>- 🟢 Grounded Claims<br>- 🟡 Contested Highlights<br>- 🔴 Inferred Markers<br>- ⚠️ Contradiction Alerts" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="200" x="50" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ui_sidebar" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#0288D1;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=15;spacingTop=10;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Transparency Panel</b><br><hr>1. Trust Indicator (Gauge)<br>2. Contextual Rubric<br>3. Active Ledger Rules" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="140" width="200" x="50" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="db_ledger" parent="1" style="shape=cylinder3;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;boundedLbl=1;backgroundOutline=1;size=15;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#F57C00;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=20;spacingTop=40;fontSize=12;" value="<b><span style="white-space: pre;">	</span>Stateful Ledger</b><br><hr>- Rules &amp; Assumptions<br>- Missing Info Log<br>- Rubric State<br>- Trust Scores" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="200" x="350" y="180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_assemble" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Context Assembly</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="200" x="660" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_gen" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Pass 1: Generation Draft</b><br>(Creates baseline response)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="660" y="210" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_l1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Layer 1: Internal Logic</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="940" y="120" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_l2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Layer 2: External Validation</b><br>(Claim Classification)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="940" y="250" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api_format" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#388E3C;fontSize=12;" value="<b>JSON Data Serialization</b><br>(Merge text + flags + traces)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="200" x="780" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tool_search" parent="1" style="ellipse;shape=cloud;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#F3E5F5;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;fontSize=12;" value="<b>Google Search Grounding</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="200" x="940" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e1" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui_in" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#333333;" target="api_assemble" value="1. Submit"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.2195" y="-5" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e2" edge="1" parent="1" source="db_ledger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#F57C00;" target="api_assemble" value="2. Inject Context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.6491" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="450" y="105" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e3" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_assemble" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;" target="api_gen" value="3. Prompt + Context"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.5" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e4" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_gen" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;" target="api_l1" value="4. Baseline Text"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.3333" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="900" y="240" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="200" /> <mxPoint x="1040" y="200" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e5" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_gen" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;" target="api_l2" value="4. Baseline Text"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="900" y="240" /> <mxPoint x="900" y="280" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e6" edge="1" parent="1" source="db_ledger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#F57C00;" target="api_l1" value="Evaluate Constraints"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.1667" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="450" y="150" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e7" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;startArrow=classic;endArrow=classic;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#7B1FA2;" target="tool_search" value="Fetch Live Facts"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.6" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e9" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_l1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;" target="api_format" value="Contradictions & Gaps"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="0.0189" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1170" y="150" /> <mxPoint x="1170" y="370" /> <mxPoint x="880" y="370" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e10" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_l2" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#388E3C;" target="api_format" value="Classifications"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="1040" y="340" /> <mxPoint x="880" y="340" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e11" edge="1" parent="1" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#0288D1;" value="5. Parsed Response & Traces"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="880" y="500" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="500" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="280" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="280" /> </Array> <mxPoint x="880" y="450" as="sourcePoint" /> <mxPoint x="250" y="280" as="targetPoint" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e12" edge="1" parent="1" source="api_format" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#F57C00;" target="db_ledger" value="6. Auto-update assumptions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="880" y="460" /> <mxPoint x="450" y="460" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e13" edge="1" parent="1" source="ui_chat" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#0288D1;" target="db_ledger" value="7. Feedback & Resolutions"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="300" y="220" /> <mxPoint x="300" y="260" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="e14" edge="1" parent="1" source="db_ledger" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;html=1;dashed=1;labelBackgroundColor=#ffffff;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;strokeColor=#F57C00;" target="ui_sidebar" value="8. Sync UI View"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="450" y="460" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
